languages.text: [draft]"Факт сотрудничества — общения о механических материях — зафиксирован в архивных логах с пометкой "крайне высокая эффективность". {n}Артизан задумчиво склоняет голову. {/n} "Тем не менее, в данной ситуации этот опыт — опыт совместного изучения — не является релевантным".

traits.locale_text: "Утвердительно: этот тезис правдив. Факт сотрудничества зафиксирован в архивных логах этой единицы с пометкой "крайне высокая эффективность". {n}Артизан делает задумчивый жест мехадендритами. {/n} "Тем не менее, в данной ситуации этот опыт не является релевантным".

languages.text: "Confirmation: this thesis is true. The fact of cooperation is recorded in the archival logs with the following note: 'extremely high efficiency.'" {n}The Artisan bows his head pensively.{/n} "Nevertheless, this experience is not relevant in this situation."
languages.original_text: "Подтверждение: этот тезис правдив. Факт сотрудничества зафиксирован в архивных логах с пометкой "крайне высокая эффективность". {n}Артизан задумчиво склоняет голову. {/n} "Тем не менее, в данной ситуации этот опыт не является релевантным".

traits.locale_text: "Confirmation: this thesis is true. The fact of cooperation is recorded in the archival logs of this unit with the following note: 'extremely high efficiency.'" {n}The Artisan bows his head pensively.{/n} "Nevertheless, this experience is not relevant in this situation."

"Confirmation: this thesis is true. The fact of cooperation is recorded in the archival logs of this unit with the following note: 'extremely high efficiency.'" {n}The Artisan bows his head pensively.{/n} "Nevertheless, this experience is not relevant in this situation."

"Confirmation: this thesis is true. The fact of cooperation is recorded in the archival logs of this unit with the following note: 'extremely high efficiency.'" {n}The Artisan bows his head pensively.{/n} "Nevertheless, this experience is not relevant in this situation."

languages.text: 「確認：この論文は真実である。協力の事実はこの部隊の記録に残されており、以下のように記されている。非常に高い効率性。」{n}職人は深く考え込むように頭を垂れる。{/n}「しかしながら、この経験は現在の状況では関係ない」
languages.original_text: "Confirmation: this thesis is true. The fact of cooperation is recorded in the archival logs of this unit with the following note: 'extremely high efficiency.'" {n}The Artisan bows his head pensively.{/n} "Nevertheless, this experience is not relevant in this situation."

traits.locale_text: 「確認：この論文は真実である。協力の事実はこの部隊の記録に残されており、以下のように記されている。非常に高い効率性。」{n}職人は深く考え込むように頭を垂れる。{n}「しかしながら、この経験は現在の状況では関係ない。」

languages.text: "Onaylama: Bu tez doğrudur. İş birliği gerçeği, arşiv kayıtlarına şu notla kaydedilmiştir: 'Son derece yüksek verimlilik'." {n}Zanaatkâr, başını düşünceli bir şekilde eğiyor.{/n} "Yine de bu deneyim, mevcut durumla alakasızdır."
languages.original_text: "Confirmation: this thesis is true. The fact of cooperation is recorded in the archival logs with the following note: 'extremely high efficiency.'" {n}The Artisan bows his head pensively.{/n} "Nevertheless, this experience is not relevant in this situation."

traits.locale_text: "Onaylama: Bu tez doğrudur. İş birliği gerçeği, arşiv kayıtlarına şu notla kaydedilmiştir: 'Son derece yüksek verimlilik'." {n}Zanaatkâr, başını düşünceli bir şekilde eğiyor.{/n} "Yine de bu deneyim, mevcut durumla alakasızdır."

languages.text: «Confirmación: esta hipótesis es correcta. La cooperación quedó registrada en los archivos de memoriacon la siguiente observación: "eficiencia extremadamente alta"». {n}La unidad artesana inclina la cabeza pensativamente.{/n} «En cualquier caso, esta experiencia no es relevante para la situación actual».
languages.original_text: "Confirmation: this thesis is true. The fact of cooperation is recorded in the archival logs with the following note: 'extremely high efficiency.'" {n}The Artisan bows his head pensively.{/n} "Nevertheless, this experience is not relevant in this situation."

traits.locale_text: «Confirmación: esta hipótesis es correcta. La cooperación quedó registrada en los archivos de memoriacon la siguiente observación: "eficiencia extremadamente alta"». {n}La unidad artesana inclina la cabeza pensativamente.{/n} «En cualquier caso, esta experiencia no es relevante para la situación actual».

languages.text: “确认：此论点成立。档案日志中记录了相关合作事实，并附注如下：‘效率极高’。”{n}匠人若有所思地低下头。{/n}“然而，此类经验在当前情境下并不适用。”
languages.original_text: "Confirmation: this thesis is true. The fact of cooperation is recorded in the archival logs with the following note: 'extremely high efficiency.'" {n}The Artisan bows his head pensively.{/n} "Nevertheless, this experience is not relevant in this situation."

traits.locale_text: “确认：此论点成立。档案日志中记录了相关合作事实，并附注如下：‘效率极高’。”{n}匠人若有所思地低下头。{/n}“然而，此类经验在当前情境下并不适用。”

languages.text: « Confirmation : cette thèse est effectivement avérée. Les exemples de coopération enregistrés dans les journaux d'archive portent la mention suivante : "efficacité optimale". {n}L'artisan baisse la tête d'un air songeur.{/n} Quoi qu'il en soit, cette expérience n'a rien à voir avec la situation actuelle. »
languages.original_text: "Confirmation: this thesis is true. The fact of cooperation is recorded in the archival logs with the following note: 'extremely high efficiency.'" {n}The Artisan bows his head pensively.{/n} "Nevertheless, this experience is not relevant in this situation."

traits.locale_text: « Confirmation : cette thèse est effectivement avérée. Les exemples de coopération enregistrés dans les journaux d'archive portent la mention suivante : "efficacité optimale". {n}L'artisan baisse la tête d'un air songeur.{/n} Quoi qu'il en soit, cette expérience n'a rien à voir avec la situation actuelle. »

languages.text: "Bestätigung: Diese These ist korrekt. Die Kooperation ist in den Archivprotokollen mit folgendem Hinweis vermerkt: 'extrem hohe Effizienz'." {n}Der Artifex senkt nachdenklich den Kopf.{/n} "Allerdings ist diese Erfahrung in dieser Situation nicht relevant."
languages.original_text: "Confirmation: this thesis is true. The fact of cooperation is recorded in the archival logs with the following note: 'extremely high efficiency.'" {n}The Artisan bows his head pensively.{/n} "Nevertheless, this experience is not relevant in this situation."
